rdf:Description.dc:publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft,

rdf:Description.dcterms:hasPart: The Prayer of Athanasius for the Passing of the Soul
The Book that Came from Jerusalem
Prayer for priests and deacons, male and female, who have died
Second Station: Reading from Gospel of Mark and brief homily
Intercessory Prayer for Peace of the Church
Third Station: Reading from Gospel of Luke with brief homily
Fourth Station: Reading from Gospel of John with brief homily
Fifth Station: Reading from Gospel of Matthew with brief homily
Sixth Station: Reading from Gospel of Luke with brief homily
Seventh Station: Reading from the Gospel of John with brief homily
Intercessory Prayer upon the Arrival of the Dead at the Church
Short Prayer (on the Departure of the Soul from the Body)
Reading from the Epistle of Peter
Reading from the Book of Acts
Reading from the Gospel of Luke with a brief homily
Reading from the Epistle of Paul to the Romans
Reading from Acts of the Apostles
Reading from the Gospel of Matthew for when you bring out the embalmed Dead from his home, with short prayer
Prayer for the Journey to Heaven
Prayer when they put the cover on the tomb
Reading from the Epistle of Paul
Reading from the Acts of the Apostles
Reading from the Gospel of Luke
Readings for the third day (after the death)
Readings for the seventh day (after the death)
Readings for the twelfth day (after the death)
Readings for thirty days (after the death)
Readings for forty, sixty, eighty days and for a half a year (after the death), and for all memorials of the Dead
Another Prayer for all the Dead
Another Prayer for all the Dead
Prayer when Officials of the Church Stretch their Hands over the Dead
Homily of Abba Sälama, Bishop of Ethiopia, to be read for all the Dead
Homily of Jacob of Sǝrug for Departed Priests and Deacons
Prayer of Absolution given from God to our father, Peter
Funeral Ritual for an Adult Woman
Story of the Passion of Jesus Christ
